description: Set definitions — set names, partial set bonuses (2-5 items equipped), and full set bonuses (up to 8 properties).

index.description: Internal set identifier, referenced by the set column in SetItems.txt

name.description: String table key for the set display name (.tbl lookup)

version.description: Game version availability (0 = Classic + LoD, 100 = LoD only)

level.description: Set level (reference only, not loaded by game engine)

PCode2a.description: Partial bonus 2a property code (activates with 2 items equipped)

PCode2b.description: Partial bonus 2b property code (activates with 2 items equipped)

PCode3a.description: Partial bonus 3a property code (activates with 3 items equipped)

PCode3b.description: Partial bonus 3b property code (activates with 3 items equipped)

PCode4a.description: Partial bonus 4a property code (activates with 4 items equipped)

PCode4b.description: Partial bonus 4b property code (activates with 4 items equipped)

PCode5a.description: Partial bonus 5a property code (activates with 5 items equipped)

PCode5b.description: Partial bonus 5b property code (activates with 5 items equipped)

FCode1.description: Full set bonus 1 property code (all items equipped)

*eol.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game)
